summary: Created MPI-107: remote per-model restart poll (comfyController.js:319) watches s.ready (wrapper, always up during comfy-only restart) instead of s.comfyReady. Wrong flag -> false timeout (line 329 'still loading nodes') OR early-break -> gen vs not-yet-up ComfyUI (interrupt 503 + no output); comfyNeedsRestart can't clear (only path at 322 behind broken poll) -> restart re-loops every i2v gen -> silent fall-to-local (355) orphans live Pod. Found live on L4, Wan 2.2 i2v. App-only fix, no rebuild.

Picked up — applying 3 app-side fixes: (1) poll comfyReady not ready, (2) no silent local fallback on restart-timeout, (3) ensure flag clears on success. Verify via reconnect+retry (doubles as case-a/case-b Pod probe).

MPI-107 COMPLETE + accepted. Fix (comfyController.js, app-only no rebuild): (1) remote restart poll gates on comfyReady not bare wrapper ready, (2) _ensureRemoteReady probe retries 3x/700ms before falling to local. USER live-verified on L40S v0.4.8: full original repro (Cancel mid-gen -> change ratio -> regen) stayed IDLE/REMOTE, regenerated at new ratio 320x320 i2v_ms_024, no 'generating locally' toast, no false 'still loading nodes' timeout. Case (a) confirmed = pure app bug. Out of scope: latent-not-produced=MPI-89; reconnect-deletes-warm-Pod-on-stock-out=uncarded memory breadcrumb.
